personal_info.name: Christopher Joseph
personal_info.introduction: I am a Computer Science student at SCMS School of Engineering and Technology with a strong academic record (CGPA: 8.39). I am passionate about building practical software solutions and continuously improving my development skills.

education.institution: SCMS School of Engineering and Technology

projects.title: Lost and Found Management System
projects.description: A comprehensive solution built to efficiently manage items, report losses, search databases, and track recovery statuses. Features a clean desktop UI built with Tkinter.

experience_timeline.title: Project Architecture
experience_timeline.description: Focusing on Object-Oriented Programming. Implementing complex logic in Python and Java, focusing on software efficiency and data structures during my 3rd semester.

experience_timeline.title: Full Stack Exploration
experience_timeline.description: Web & Database Integration. Mastering MySQL and MongoDB for robust data storage while crafting responsive front-end experiences with modern CSS frameworks.

experience_timeline.title: Foundational Programming
experience_timeline.description: C Language & Logic Building. Establishing a solid core in algorithmic thinking and memory management through C programming.
